title: Old generation of caves
description: this datapack will bring back the old generation of caves without biomes
body:
This datapack will bring back the old generation of caves without biomes, but with new structures such as amethyst rod and ancient city .Also in the caves will be the old spavn ore and copper is present in this list! I want to note that this datapack will bring back the old generation of caves only, ie mountains and terrain will not be affected!
